What users say

Amazing!

I am really thankful for this app, anything helps these days. This is my very first time leaving an App Store review, and I appreciate the fact that Benny even exists!

Saved me so much money!

I didn't realize I could get cash back on SNAP, but Benny makes it so easy to do that. The app looks great and is easy to use. It's the new favorite app on my Home Screen.

SO pleased with this app!

I grocery shop for my family and now I get paid to do it! As a single mom being able to get a few dollars here and there REALLY helps. So grateful to the creators of this app - they've truly provided a necessary service!
